exercises.prompt: C1 register: « L'annonce a ___ un vif débat. »
exercises.explanation: Susciter un débat — the precise C1 verb where B1 says 'faire'.

options.text: making science accessible to the public

exercises.explanation: A classic faux ami: vulgarisation = popularisation, nothing vulgar about it.

exercises.template: Certains {{b1}} l'innovation, d'autres en redoutent les dérives.
exercises.explanation: Prôner = to advocate — the counterweight to redouter in balanced argument.

exercises.template: Les médias se sont {{b1}} de la question.
exercises.explanation: S'emparer de = to seize on: les médias se sont emparés de…

exercises.prompt: To compare media treatments of one event, the C1 reflex is to ask…

options.text: Who speaks, to whom, with what intention?

exercises.explanation: Source analysis: énonciateur, destinataire, intention (informer / convaincre / divertir).

exercises.template: Nous vivons une situation {{b1}} dans l'histoire des techniques.
exercises.explanation: Inédit(e) = unprecedented — agrees with situation: inédite.

exercises.prompt: Match each C1 noun to its English meaning.
Put the words in order: "This transformation raises major stakes."
Listen to the chronique opener. What double movement does it describe?
exercises.transcript: Chaque avancée du numérique suscite autant d'enthousiasme que de méfiance.

options.text: Every digital breakthrough sparks as much enthusiasm as distrust
Everyone agrees the internet is harmless

exercises.explanation: « autant d'enthousiasme que de méfiance » — the balanced C1 frame.

exercises.prompt: Read this chronique extract and answer both questions.
exercises.passageFr: On nous promettait la communication universelle ; nous voici sommés de répondre à des messages que personne n'a vraiment écrits. L'essor des assistants numériques relève moins de l'avancée que de la mutation : ce ne sont plus nos outils qui changent, ce sont nos usages — et peut-être nos pensées. Les optimistes prônent l'adaptation ; je m'interroge, quant à moi, sur ce que nous abandonnons en chemin.
exercises.passageEn: We were promised universal communication; here we are, ordered to answer messages nobody really wrote. The rise of digital assistants is less a breakthrough than a transformation: it is no longer our tools that change, but our practices — and perhaps our thoughts. Optimists advocate adaptation; as for me, I wonder what we abandon along the way.

questions.prompt: What distinction does the writer draw?

options.text: Less a breakthrough (avancée) than a deep transformation (mutation)

questions.prompt: This text is a chronique, not a news article, because…

options.text: a personal voice questions and takes position (je m'interroge, quant à moi)

exercises.prompt: « Cette promesse ___ du mirage. » (belongs to the realm of)
exercises.explanation: Relever de = to belong to the realm of: cette promesse relève du mirage.

exercises.prompt: Listen, then choose what it means.
exercises.transcript: L'essor du numérique a suscité des débats inédits.

options.text: The rise of digital has sparked unprecedented debates.
Some advocate innovation; others dread its excesses.
The media seized on the slightest breakthrough.

exercises.explanation: susciter = to give rise to / spark.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word (from this unit's vocabulary).
exercises.explanation: « Une avancée majeure en médecine. » — a breakthrough.

exercises.prompt: Match each word to its English meaning.

pairs.right: to belong to the realm of

exercises.prompt: Put the words in order: “This transformation raises major ethical stakes.”
Speaking practice — listen, then say the sentence aloud and record yourself:
exercises.targetFr: L'essor du numérique a suscité des débats inédits.
exercises.targetEn: The rise of digital has sparked unprecedented debates.

exercises.prompt: Speaking practice — say this sentence aloud and record yourself:
exercises.targetFr: Les médias se sont emparés de la moindre avancée.
exercises.targetEn: The media seized on the slightest breakthrough.
